name: ASRock Z790 PG-ITX/TB4 Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6800+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Killer 2.5G LAN - Killer 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C (Front)
shortName: ASRock Z790 PG-ITX/TB4 Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x
description: Mini-ITX Z790 motherboard with Thunderbolt 4 support for Intel LGA 1700 socket and DDR5 memory.
